Tiyatro &#About the Department

KHAS Theatre Department, founded in 2006, offers a four-year undergraduate program that provides a Bachelor of Arts degree.

The program aims to help students develop their knowledge and creativity and the skills they need in their future profession as theatre artists. The curriculum is designed to provide a wide range of possibilities to specialize in professional life. It serves as an optimal combination of theory and practice. Students start training in the fundamentals of theatre. Then while focusing primarily on acting, they can also develop their interests in a particular areas such as dramatic writing, directing, and theatre management.

The department’s academic staff consists of prominent actors, directors, and theatre managers of well-known theatre companies or widely known independent artists. Our lecturers have international experience and have profound theoretical and practical knowledge of theatre. Besides their career as artists, they also have extended years of experience as lecturers.

To give a contemporary education, the department emphasizes internationality. Therefore, it enables its students to acquire international experience through Erasmus and other exchange programs, international academic events, and workshops.

According to their interests and talents, our graduates can work as actors/actresses, directors, playwrights, theatre managers, theatre instructors, and many other theatre-related professions.
